Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Now that we've positively identified this contact as an enemy submarine, let's use the assets at our disposal to attack and sink it.

You can do this in a few ways, but the most expedient will be to use the torpedoes carried by your HSS-2B helicopter to attack the submarine. One tip here is to drop your torpedoes on the enemy submarine from a rear aspect, where he will have difficulty detecting the incoming torpedoes.
If you want, you can also attack the submarine using the onboard weapons from your ships, though it's worth noting that the helicopter is the primary anti-submarine weapon of the surface ship.
